description.unified: Targets the ally with the lowest HP and allies nearby to heal HP. Deals M.DMG to enemies near the target, and reduces enemy ATK Spd by 25% for 10 sec.
Deals M.DMG, inflicts knockback, and shackles the target enemy for 6 sec. Enemies inflicted by shackle take 25% increased M.DMG while the effect lasts.
Grants Invincibility to all allies for 7 sec and heals HP for the duration of skill.
Each attack has a 20% chance of dealing M.DMG to target and inflicting stun for [0.9 sec->1.5 sec].

light.unified: Mana cost is reduced by 1. [(removed) If there is only 1 enemy, damage dealt is increased by 100%]

dark.unified: Number of targets changes to [increased by 3->2]. [(removed) Mana cost is increased by 1000]

light.unified: Invincibility duration is increased by 1.5 sec. [(removed) Mana cost is reduced by 1000]

dark.unified: In exchange for [3000 Mana Cost->2 additional Mana Cost] and a 3 sec reduction of Invincibility duration, all allies gain 50% ATK. [(removed) cooldown is reduced by 15 sec]
Attack range is boosted by 20%. [(removed) Maximum Attack increase stacks are increased by 5]

description.unified: [Spear of Light] Gains Immunity to CC for the skill's duration and increases M.Weakness of the target by {0}% for 10 sec.
[Holy Sanctuary] ATK is increased by 25% for the duration of skill, and recovers {0} Mana per sec.
Increasing the casting speed of all skills, and upon every skill use, increases ATK by {0}% and [M.DEF->DEF] by {1}%. This effect can stack up to 7 times.
Summons the soul of God's Book, Genesis, increasing the number of targets of normal attacks to 2 for 10 sec, healing HP of all allies and dispelling negative effects every 2 sec.

1.from: Changes Skill Activation Requirements of the Soul Weapon to 4.
1.to: Changes Skill Activation requirements of Soul Weapon to 4.
1.unified: Changes Skill Activation requirements of Soul Weapon to 4.
